title: Shun-Chin Hsu
text: Home * People * Shun-Chin Hsu Shun-Chin Hsu [1] Shun-Chin Hsu , a Taiwanese computer scientiest and Professor at the Department of Information Engineering and Computer Science [2] at the National Taiwan University . His research interests covers Games , specially Chinese Chess and Computer Go , Retrograde Analysis for Chinese Chess Endgame Tablebases , and various search issues. Shun-Chin Hsu is co-author of various strong programs, successfully competing at ICGA Tournaments [3] of Chinese Chess , Go and Connect6 . Along with Shi-Jim Yen and Tsan-Cheng Su , Shun-Chin Hsu is author of the Othello program Tower of Othello , which won silver at TAAI 2013 [4] and the gold medal (shared) at TCGA 2014 .
